scripts.prebuild: npm exec --workspace mobile -- expo prebuild --platform ios
scripts.build:simulator: xcodebuild -workspace ../mobile/ios/HappiTime.xcworkspace -scheme HappiTime -configuration Debug -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' -derivedDataPath /private/tmp/HappiTimeSwiftUIVerificationDerivedData -skipPackagePluginValidation build
